name: Okta Org2Org Application Lifecycle Change (30 days)
description: Detects create/update/activate lifecycle changes to Org2Org applications in Okta, aligned with public Panther detections.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_app_id, COALESCE(l.target_app_label, l.target_id, l.target_app_id) AS app_name, l.event_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) IN ('application.lifecycle.create', 'application.lifecycle.update', 'application.lifecycle.activate') AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.target_app_label, '')) LIKE '%org2org%' AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Review Org2Org lifecycle changes for approval, validate federation trust settings, and remove unauthorized cross-tenant links.
